# PER5 — OpenBIM Quality & Business Integration

## Overview

PER5 is an engineering company focused on **OpenBIM workflows and infrastructure projects**.

My role combines **technical quality validation and business interface**, ensuring that project deliverables meet interoperability and documentation standards.

## My Role

I work across both **technical quality assurance and client-facing processes**, connecting business requirements with operational project delivery.

Main responsibilities include:

- Validation of OpenBIM deliverables (IFC-based workflows)
- Standardization of documentation and deliverable structures
- Ensuring interoperability across BIM platforms
- Translating client requirements into technical scopes
- Qualification of B2B leads and project opportunities

## Quality Approach

Quality is applied at both **technical and process levels**, ensuring consistency from the first client interaction to the final project delivery.

Practices include:

- Deliverable validation
- Documentation standardization
- Process traceability
- Structured scope definition

## Technologies & Standards

- OpenBIM
- IFC workflows
- IDS validation
- BCF issue tracking
- BIM interoperability standards

## Key Contributions

- Reduced project rework through standardized deliverables
- Improved client communication and technical scope clarity
- Strengthened the company’s digital presence and service portfolio
- Organized bilingual (PT/EN) service documentation
